title: Visitors to George are welcomed in style
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - George Mayor Jackie...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - George Mayor Jackie von Brandis, councillors and representatives of the police, traffic, law enforcement and community safety directorates are currently conducting a Mayoral Roadblock in CJ Langenhoven Street on the outskirts of George.

The main aim is to welcome visitors to George with a friendly smile, handshake and goody bag.


> The roadblock will end at 14:00.


VIDEO: Michelle Pienaar

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Christiaan van Rensburg from Ladismith receives a mayoral handshake at the roadblock.

Henco du Plessis, a farmer from Kareedouw, is surprised with a goody bag by Mayor Jackie von Brandis. "Eat your chops!" Says this sheep farmer with a smile.

Mayor Jackie von Brandis welcomes Ida Muller at the Mayoral Roadblock in CJ Langenhoven Street.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
